content:
Aṣiṣe boṣewa lori idajọ ọjọgbọn oludari (standard error of the mean) ni a maa n lo lati ṣe iṣiro ipele pataki (confidence level) ninu idanwo iṣiro. Nigbati a ba n ṣeto ipele pataki, a maa n lo awọn nọmba pataki (critical values) lati tabili t-Student tabi z-tabili, da lori iwọn ayẹwo ati boya a mọ tabi ko mọ iyatọ boṣewa ti olugba.

Fun awọn iwe iṣẹ ayẹwo (sample data), ti iwọn ayẹwo ba kere ju 30, a maa n lo t-distribution, ati awọn nọmba pataki ti a gbe ninu ifosiwewe idajọ (critical t-values) da lori ipele pataki ti a yan (fun apẹẹrẹ, 1.96 fun 95% ipele pataki ni z-distribution, tabi iye t ti o baamu
